title: Sky Patrol
writer: George Waggner, Norton S. Parker, Hal Forrest
actors: John Trent, Marjorie Reynolds, Milburn Stone
plot: "Tailspin Tommy" Tompkins and "Skeeter" Milligan are training young U. S. Army fliers for the newly-formed 'Sky Patrol,'a branch of the Army Reserves which operates along the borders and coast-lines, on the lookout for smugglers. ...
